COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-26-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the Record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Jane Creason, Esq. for Plaintiff: All Hallows Associates, L.P.
Plaintiff's Witness: Tonia Gaddies, also present in court.
Defendant: Marie Gibbs, present in pro per.
Settlement JPT: David M. Porter, present withthe parties, and addressed to the Court of the settlement conference.
Parties have settled, terms not read into the record, signed "Stipulation for Entry of Judgment" not filed.
matter is deemed settled, trial date vacated.
